example_cases.description: handle_raw_prompt maps a new session to an existing Context by project_hash, or creates a new one
example_cases.input: JsonlMessage with project_hash='abc123' that matches an existing context's directory
example_cases.expected_output: Returns context_id of the existing context and a new prompt_id. Context updated_at is refreshed.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one Context where directory maps to project_hash 'abc123'.

example_cases.description: handle_raw_prompt creates new Context when project_hash is unknown
example_cases.input: JsonlMessage with project_hash='newproj' not matching any existing context
example_cases.expected_output: Returns a new context_id (UUID v7) and prompt_id. New Context row created with status='running'.
example_cases.setup: Empty contexts table in DB.

example_cases.description: handle_raw_prompt creates 'Unknown' context when project_hash cannot resolve to a directory
example_cases.input: JsonlMessage with project_hash that cannot be resolved to any known directory path
example_cases.expected_output: New Context created with name='Unknown', directory=null
example_cases.setup: Empty contexts table. No directory mapping for the hash.

example_cases.description: handle_raw_prompt rejects when 4 active contexts already exist (INV-002)
example_cases.input: JsonlMessage for a new project when 4 contexts already have status != 'parked'
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(MaxContextsReached). No new context created.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with 4 contexts: 2 running, 1 done, 1 stuck.

example_cases.description: State transition: parked → running when new session detected
example_cases.input: handle_raw_prompt called with message for a parked context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'running'. on_state_change emitted with event_type='status_changed', payload.new_status='running'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'parked' status.

example_cases.description: State transition: running → done when git commit detected
example_cases.input: handle_git_signal with signal_type='commit' for a running context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'done'. on_state_change emitted with event_type='status_changed'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'running' status.

example_cases.description: State transition: running → done when git push detected
example_cases.input: handle_git_signal with signal_type='push' for a running context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'done'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'running' status.

example_cases.description: State transition: running → stuck when error patterns detected for 10+ minutes
example_cases.input: Series of handle_raw_prompt calls with error-pattern content over 10 minutes (mocked clock)
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'stuck'. on_state_change emitted.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Mock clock. Send error-pattern messages spanning 10+ minutes.

example_cases.description: State transition: running → parked after 30 minutes of no activity
example_cases.input: No handle_raw_prompt or handle_git_signal calls for 30 minutes on a running context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'parked'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Mock clock and advance 30 minutes.

example_cases.description: State transition: done → running when new prompts detected
example_cases.input: handle_raw_prompt called with message for a done context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'running'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'done' status.

example_cases.description: State transition: stuck → running when new non-error prompts detected
example_cases.input: handle_raw_prompt called with non-error content for a stuck context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'running'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'stuck' status.

example_cases.description: State transition: done → parked after 30 minutes of no activity
example_cases.input: No activity for 30 minutes on a done context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'parked'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with done context. Mock clock and advance 30 minutes.

example_cases.description: State transition: stuck → parked after 30 minutes of no activity
example_cases.input: No activity for 30 minutes on a stuck context
example_cases.expected_output: Context status changes to 'parked'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with stuck context. Mock clock and advance 30 minutes.

example_cases.description: Manual override sets status immediately and suppresses auto-detection for 15 minutes
example_cases.input: override_status(context_id, 'done') on a running context, then handle_git_signal(commit) within 15 minutes
example_cases.expected_output: Status immediately set to 'done'. status_override_until set to now+15min. The git signal within cooldown does NOT change status.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Mock clock.

example_cases.description: Illegal transition: parked → done is rejected
example_cases.input: handle_git_signal with signal_type='commit' for a parked context
example_cases.expected_output: Status remains 'parked'. No state_change event emitted. Git signal is logged but does not trigger transition.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'parked' status.

example_cases.description: Illegal transition: parked → stuck is rejected
example_cases.input: Error pattern detected for 10+ minutes on a parked context
example_cases.expected_output: Status remains 'parked'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with parked context.

example_cases.description: Illegal transition: done → stuck is rejected
example_cases.input: Error patterns on a done context (no new prompts, just lingering errors)
example_cases.expected_output: Status remains 'done'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with done context.

example_cases.description: Illegal transition: stuck → done is rejected (must go through running first)
example_cases.input: handle_git_signal with signal_type='commit' for a stuck context
example_cases.expected_output: Status remains 'stuck'. Git commit on stuck context does not directly transition to done.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context in 'stuck' status.

example_cases.description: maybe_distill triggers distillation when 3-5 raw prompts accumulate for a context
example_cases.input: Call handle_raw_prompt 3 times for the same context, then call maybe_distill
example_cases.expected_output: maybe_distill returns an Intent with tier='narrative', content populated by LLM mock. Raw prompts are linked to the new intent.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Mock LLM returns a narrative string. Insert 3 raw prompts.

example_cases.description: maybe_distill does NOT trigger when fewer than 3 raw prompts accumulated
example_cases.input: Call handle_raw_prompt 2 times, then call maybe_distill
example_cases.expected_output: maybe_distill returns intent=null, is_direction_change=false. No LLM call made.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Insert 2 raw prompts.

example_cases.description: Distillation emits distillation_started and distillation_completed events
example_cases.input: Call maybe_distill with sufficient prompts accumulated
example_cases.expected_output: on_state_change emitted twice: first with event_type='distillation_started', then 'distillation_completed' after LLM responds
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context and 5 pending prompts. Mock LLM with 100ms delay.

example_cases.description: LLM unavailable during distillation returns QueueFull/LlmUnavailable error for retry
example_cases.input: Call maybe_distill when LLM mock returns LlmUnavailable
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(LlmUnavailable). Prompts remain pending (not consumed). Intent not created.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context and 5 pending prompts. Mock LLM to return error.

example_cases.description: Narrative intent content does not exceed 200 characters
example_cases.input: Call maybe_distill where LLM mock returns a 250-char string
example_cases.expected_output: The stored Intent.content is truncated to 200 characters
example_cases.setup: Mock LLM to return a string longer than 200 chars.

example_cases.description: run_compression_cycle compresses narrative intents older than 4 hours into summary tier
example_cases.input: Call run_compression_cycle when DB has 6 narrative intents created 5 hours ago
example_cases.expected_output: Returns compressed_count > 0. New summary-tier intent created with compressed_from containing the 6 source intent IDs. Source intents marked archived.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with 6 narrative intents with created_at = now - 5h. Mock LLM for compression.

example_cases.description: run_compression_cycle compresses summary intents older than 3 days into label tier
example_cases.input: Call run_compression_cycle when DB has 4 summary intents created 4 days ago
example_cases.expected_output: Returns compressed_count > 0. New label-tier intent created. Source summaries archived.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with 4 summary intents with created_at = now - 4d. Mock LLM.

example_cases.description: Compression maintains compressed_from chain for traceability
example_cases.input: Compress narratives → summary → label, then call expand_compressed_intent on the label
example_cases.expected_output: expand_compressed_intent returns the summary intents. Each summary's compressed_from points to original narratives. Full chain is traversable.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with narratives, compress to summaries, compress to label.

example_cases.description: Direction change detected when new intent semantically diverges from previous
example_cases.input: maybe_distill where previous intent was 'implementing login page' and new prompts are about 'refactoring database schema'
example_cases.expected_output: Returns is_direction_change=true. Created Intent has is_direction_change=true. on_state_change emitted with event_type='intent_created' and payload.is_direction_change=true for UI to render 转折 marker.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context and previous intent. Mock LLM to return is_direction_change=true.

example_cases.description: Direction change detection combined with distillation in single LLM call
example_cases.input: Call maybe_distill and observe LLM call count
example_cases.expected_output: Exactly 1 LLM call made (distill()). Direction change is determined from the same call's response, not a separate API call.
example_cases.setup: Mock LLM with call counter. Seed context with previous intent and 5 new prompts.

example_cases.description: submit_manual_intent creates intent with source='manual'
example_cases.input: submit_manual_intent(context_id, '开始重构用户认证模块')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns intent_id. New Intent with source='manual', content='开始重构用户认证模块', tier='narrative'. on_state_change emitted with event_type='intent_created'.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one running context.

example_cases.description: submit_manual_intent with no active context returns error
example_cases.input: submit_manual_intent(null, 'some intent') when no contexts exist
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(NoActiveContext)
example_cases.setup: Empty contexts table.

example_cases.description: correct_intent creates correction and preserves original intent
example_cases.input: correct_intent(intent_id, '修正：是在重构缓存层而非认证')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns correction_id. New Intent created with source='manual_correction', corrects_id=original intent_id. Original intent is NOT modified or deleted.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one context and one auto-distilled intent.

example_cases.description: Manual correction preserves original intent — both versions queryable (regression guard)
example_cases.input: correct_intent(intent_id, 'corrected text'), then query both original and correction from DB
example_cases.expected_output: Original intent still exists with unchanged content. Correction intent exists with corrects_id=original. get_intent_timeline returns both (correction shown, original accessible).
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with context and auto-distilled intent. Apply correction. Query DB directly to verify both rows.

example_cases.description: correct_intent on nonexistent intent returns NotFound
example_cases.input: correct_intent('nonexistent-uuid', 'new text')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(NotFound)
example_cases.setup: Empty intents table.

example_cases.description: get_intent_timeline returns paginated intents for a context, most recent first
example_cases.input: get_intent_timeline(context_id, limit=10, before_id=null)
example_cases.expected_output: Returns intents array sorted by created_at DESC, max 10 items. has_more=true if more exist.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with 20 intents across tiers for one context.

example_cases.description: get_intent_timeline displays intents at appropriate compression tiers
example_cases.input: get_intent_timeline for a context with narrative, summary, and label tier intents
example_cases.expected_output: Response includes intents with tier field correctly reflecting narrative (recent), summary (older), label (oldest). Archived source intents are excluded from main timeline.
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with intents at all 3 tiers. Mark compressed sources as archived.

example_cases.description: expand_compressed_intent returns source intents for a compressed node
example_cases.input: expand_compressed_intent(summary_intent_id) where summary was compressed from 5 narratives
example_cases.expected_output: Returns source_intents array with 5 narrative intents in chronological order
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with a summary intent whose compressed_from contains 5 narrative intent IDs.

example_cases.description: expand_compressed_intent on a non-compressed intent returns NotCompressed error
example_cases.input: expand_compressed_intent(narrative_intent_id) where intent has no compressed_from
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(NotCompressed)
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with a narrative intent (compressed_from=null).

example_cases.description: on_state_change event emitted on every status change with correct payload
example_cases.input: Trigger a running→done transition via handle_git_signal
example_cases.expected_output: on_state_change emitted with event_type='status_changed', payload containing context_id, old_status='running', new_status='done'
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with running context. Set up event listener.

example_cases.description: override_status with invalid status string returns InvalidStatus
example_cases.input: override_status(context_id, 'invalid_status')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns Err(InvalidStatus)
example_cases.setup: Seed DB with one running context.

example_cases.description: End-to-end: raw prompt ingestion to intent creation completes within 5 seconds (INV-004)
example_cases.input: Inject 5 raw prompts via handle_raw_prompt, triggering distillation
example_cases.expected_output: on_state_change with event_type='intent_created' emitted within 5000ms of the first handle_raw_prompt call
example_cases.setup: Running context. Mock LLM responding in <100ms. Timer starts at first prompt injection.
